reviews.comment:
Cada vez que vamos al Sur, es parada obligada. La gente del Aca es súper cordial y el panorama alrededor es lindísimo! Cuando llegamos temprano vamos a tomar mate a la orilla del río, y a la noche estacionamos ahí para dormir, a la mañana desayunamos y seguimos viaje.
Lo mismo de regreso.

(Translated by Google)
Every time we go south, it's a must-stop. The people here are incredibly friendly, and the surrounding landscape is gorgeous! When we arrive early, we'll drink mate on the riverbank, and at night we'll park there to sleep. In the morning, we'll have breakfast and continue our journey.
The same goes for the return trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5amZpM1dnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy bueno para descansar del viaje y pasar una noche. La habitación amplia y cómoda, muy linda la pileta, excelente el desayuno.

(Translated by Google)
Great for resting after a trip and spending the night. The room was spacious and comfortable, the pool was lovely, and the breakfast was excellent.
